items.title: Government Constitutes National Dental Commission to Transform Dental Education and Strengthen Healthcare Quality
items.snippet: Press Release:Press Information Bureau Ministry of Health and Family Welfare Government Constitutes National Dental Commission to Transform Dental Education and Strengthen Healthcare Quality Posted On: 20 MAR 2026 1:52PM by PIB Delhi In a major reform aimed at improving the quality of dental education and aligning it with global standards, the Government of India has constituted the National Dental Commission (NDC) a…

items.title: Union Home Minister and Minister of Cooperation, Shri Amit Shah, pays tribute to Veerangana Rani Avantibai Lodhi on her martyrdom day
items.snippet: Press Release:Press Information Bureau Ministry of Home Affairs Union Home Minister and Minister of Cooperation, Shri Amit Shah, pays tribute to Veerangana Rani Avantibai Lodhi on her martyrdom day Veerangana Rani Avantibai Lodhi’s life remains an unparalleled example of courage, sacrifice and patriotism During the Revolt of 1857, she fought valiantly against the British and chose martyrdom over surrender Posted On: …
